name: objectAssign
description: A vendorable Object.assign polyfill bundle based on the current object.assign package logic, with helper packages folded into one file for Node.js and Bun use.
tagline: Object.assign shim with symbol-aware copy semantics.
summary: This page ships an Object.assign polyfill bundle based on the current package line, with helper packages folded into a single vendorable file. The value is to keep assign semantics local without carrying a larger helper graph.
nativeAlternative: Object.assign exists in modern runtimes, but teams cleaning up old compatibility helpers may still want a vendorable shim with the familiar export shape.

variants.label: Normalized
variants.note: Bundled into one file and then rule-based normalized for copy-paste into modern TS projects.

variants.label: Raw
variants.note: Single-file CommonJS bundle preserving the package's bound export shape and helper methods.

note: Current object.assign releases depend on multiple helper packages. This snippet folds those helpers into one vendorable file for a practical first pass.
